pageContext.name: James Bond Book Cover Boxed Set
pageContext.description: 'Mine's Bond - James Bond.'  Sideshow is proud to present the James Bond Book Cover Boxed Set of art prints by artist Michael Gillette. This officially licensed art is printed by Electric Works in San Francisco using archival inks on 100% Cotton Heavyweight rag paper with hand-torn deckle edges. The set of all 15 James Bond titles is presented in an archival box.   Each print is signed and numbered in pencil from an edition of 700. The prints are stickered on the back with copyright and licensing information.  Titles included: On Her Majesty's Secret Service, Goldfinger, The Spy Who Loved Me, Casino Royale, Dr. No, For Your Eyes Only, From Russia With Love, The Man With The Golden Gun, Moonraker, Octopussy, You Only Live Twice, Diamonds Are Forever, Quantum of Solace, Live and Let Die, and Thunderball.
